525.21(1): 7 de nas ston pa gshen rab mi bos bka' stsal pa/ gang zhig gshen rab 
526.1(1): g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po des 'khrul pa med pa shes rab kyi

526.3(1): mtshan ma rdul tsam yang med par spangs nas/ zag pa med pa shes rab kyi phung 
526.4(1): po nyid du 'grub par 'gyur ro// /yid kyi khye'u chung gis gsol pa/ gshen rab

526.6(1): zhig 'byung bar 'gyur/ gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ yid kyi khye'u chung / zag

526.18(1): ma yod snyam du sems sam/ rna ba ma yin pa gzhan zhig gi mtshan ma yod snyam du

584.8(1): stong pa nyid du shes na/thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes kyi 'bras bu de ni 'thob po 
584.9(1): thob par 'gyur ro/ /de ltar na/ me'i khams kyis nang 'dzin par byed pa'i yid 
584.10(1): thams cad nang stong pa nyid du shes na/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes kyi 'bras 
584.11(1): bu de ni 'thob po thob par 'gyur ro/ /de ltar na/ chu'i khams kyis nang 'dzin 
584.12(1): par byed pa'i yid thams cad nang stong pa nyid du shes na/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i 
584.13(1): ye shes kyi 'bras bu de 'thob po thob par 'gyur ro/ /de ltar na/ sa'i khams kyis 
584.14(1): nang 'dzin par byed pa'i yid thams cad nang stong pa nyid du shes na/ thams cad

584.16(1): mkha'i khams kyis nang 'dzin par byed pa'i yid thams cad nang stong pa nyid du

603.2(1): khams kyis 'dus ma byas bzhi la shes bya ru rtog pa thams cad 'dus ma byas stong 
603.3(1): pa nyid du shes na/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes kyi 'bras bu de ni 'thob po thob 
603.4(1): par 'gyur ro/ /de ltar na/ skye ba'i khams kyis 'dus ma byas bzhi la shes bya ru 
603.5(1): rtog pa thams cad 'dus ma byas stong pa nyid du shes na/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye 
603.6(1): shes kyi 'bras bu de ni 'thob po thob par 'gyur ro/ /de ltar na/ rga shi'i khams kyis 
603.7(1): 'dus ma byas bzhi la shes bya ru rtog pa thams cad 'dus ma byas stong pa nyid du 
603.8(1): shes na/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes kyi 'bras bu de ni 'thob po thob par 'gyur 
603.9(1): ro/ /
603.10(1): gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa// yid kyi khye'u chung / gzhan yang g.yung drung 
603.11(1): sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po rnams/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes kyi phung po 
603.12(1): de thob cing de la gnas par 'dod na rtag chad gnyis kyi mtha' thams cad mtha' 
603.13(1): las 'das pa stong pa nyid du shes na/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes kyi 'bras bu 
603.14(1): de ni 'thob po thob par 'gyur ro/ /de ltar na/ gzugs kyi khams kyis rtag chad 
603.15(1): gnyis su lta ba'i mtha' thams cad mtha' las 'das pa stong pa nyid du shes na/
603.16(1): thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes kyi 'bras bu de ni 'thob po thob par 'gyur ro/ /de 
603.17(1): ltar na/ tshor ba'i khams kyis rtag chad gnyis su lta ba'i mtha' thams cad mtha'

603.20(1): su lta ba'i mtha' thams cad mtha' las 'das pa stong pa nyid du shes na/ thams

632.14(1): lhun gyis 'grub pa dang / 'brel thogs kyi sbyin pa'i bdag po dang las gzhi 'di'i byed 
632.15(1): po kun tshe bsod dbang khams gong nas gong du mtho ste myur du sku gsum rdzogs pa'i 
632.16(1): sangs rgyas kyi go 'phang thob pa dang / zhang bod rig gzhung rnams mi nyams gong nas 
632.17(1): gong du 'phel te 'dzam gling tha gru yongs kyi snod bcud rgud pa gso zhing phan bde'i 
632.18(1): gsos su khyab pa dang / yangs pa'i rgyal khams kun du nad mug 'khrug rtsod dang rang 
632.19(1): byung 'byung ba'i 'jigs pa rnams rmeng med du zhi nas bde legs phun tshogs skyid kyi nyi 
632.20(1): ma 'gro kun yongs la shar ba'i smon 'dun dang bcas 'byung ldan [301 ]spyi lo 2015[ / ]5[ / ]1
632.21(1): nyin/ g.yung drung bon gyi bka' brten dpe rnying phyogs bsgrigs khang nas bris/ /
